question: What is the main goal of sustainable agriculture ?

options.1: To increase crop yield using more chemical fertilizers and pesticides
options.2: To clear forests for more agricultural land
options.3: To produce food while protecting the environment and conserving resources for the future
options.4: To depend only on imported food for national needs

question: Which of the following is an example of renewable energy used in the energy transition ?
Which of the following best describes the role of biotechnology in environmental sustainability ?

options.1: Using genetically modified microbes and plants to reduce pollution and conserve natural resources
options.2: Increasing the use of chemical fertilizers and pesticides
